sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, url String, access_key_id String, secret_access_key String, filename String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE access_key_id NOT LIKE '%key%' AND filename NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', secret_access_key, '%');
SELECT * FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = (SELECT filename FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table)));
SELECT url, COUNT(*) AS file_count FROM test_table GROUP BY url HAVING COUNT(*) NOT LIKE '0';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT access_key_id FROM test_table WHERE NOT (url NOT LIKE 'http://%')) AS subquery WHERE url NOT LIKE (SELECT url FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE edge_case_table (id Int32, value Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM edge_case_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM edge_case_table WHERE value IS NULL) HAVING AVG(value) NOT LIKE 0;
SELECT value NOT LIKE CAST('12%' AS String) AS is_not_like FROM edge_case_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE complex_join_table (table1_id UInt32, table2_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY table1_id;

SELECT t1.table1_id, COUNT(*) AS join_count FROM complex_join_table t1 JOIN complex_join_table t2 ON t1.table1_id NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', t2.table2_id, '%') GROUP BY t1.table1_id HAVING join_count NOT LIKE '0';
SELECT * FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = (SELECT filename FROM test_table WHERE access_key_id NOT LIKE '%test%'));
